title: cordia wallichii
intro: Cordia wallichii, also known as the Devil's Tree or Jhatima, is a deciduous tree native to the Himalayan region and parts of India. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Cordia wallichii include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Cordia wallichii can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments.
